lanes.description: Canonical portable-skill templates and companion bundles under the current ai-skills template roots.
Repo-local SKILL.md roots that are consumed in-place inside this repository.
Research, package, and source-snapshot material that must stay out of canonical skill and export lanes.
Generated agent-pack manifests, adapters, and portable skill export bundles.
Legacy or imported AI rule material kept under ai-tools until later normalization.
Authoritative manual docs, registry artifacts, and subsystem-scoped governance/support documents.
Historical AI-tools material retained only for reference and excluded from active governance flows.

lifecycle_states.description: Canonical editable source for portable skills and companion template bundles.
Repo-local skill roots that are derived from canonical portable templates.
Generated export artifacts derived from canonical AI-tools sources.
Human-readable canonical docs, registry artifacts, or subsystem-scoped governance documents.
Non-canonical research, drafts, or handoff material excluded from active generated catalogs.
Active legacy surfaces that are still in use but require later normalization or retirement.
Historical material retained only as reference and not used by active generators or runtime flows.
